faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Carteret, NJ?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Carteret typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and whether treatment requires interior and exterior applications. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants or termites in my Carteret home?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than regular ants (up to 5/8 inch), black or dark brown, and leave behind piles of wood shavings called frass. Unlike termites, carpenter ants have bent antennae and narrow waists. Our technicians provide free identification services to determine exactly which pest is affecting your Carteret property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Carteret?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Carteret locations. Carpenter ant infestations require prompt attention to prevent structural damage, so we prioritize quick response times throughout the borough and surrounding Middlesex County areas.

faqs.question: Will carpenter ants come back after treatment?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive carpenter ant treatments include colony elimination, entry point sealing, and moisture control recommendations to prevent re-infestation. We provide warranty protection and follow-up visits to ensure the colony is completely eliminated and your Carteret property remains protected long-term.
